# Copilot Instructions for Primero

For comprehensive information on how to work efficiently in this repository — including tech stack details, local setup, running tests, linting, branching conventions, and known issues — please refer to:

- **[AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)** — primary coding-agent onboarding guide (tech stack, setup, testing, linting, conventions)
- **[CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)** — contribution guidelines and branching/PR workflow
- **[doc/getting_started_development.md](../doc/getting_started_development.md)** — full local development environment setup
- **[doc/ui_ux.md](../doc/ui_ux.md)** — frontend UI/UX conventions (read before making UI changes)
